infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Scan the connection QR shown by `moxxy mobile` to connect to your agent.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow moxxy mobile to access your microphone for voice input.

plugins.cameraPermission: Scan the connection QR shown by `moxxy mobile` to connect to your agent.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow moxxy mobile to attach screenshots and photos to your messages.
